home.title: Astro Guru
home.flowDefault: In the flow of the day
home.retroMercury: Postpone contracts and important decisions; messages may be misunderstood.
home.retroVenus: Don't rush emotional decisions; past relationships may resurface.
home.retroMars: Avoid aggressive moves; channel energy into defense and planning.
home.retroJupiter: Avoid excessive optimism; think twice before taking big risks.
home.retroSaturn: Structures are being tested; be patient and stay true to commitments.
home.retroUranus: Be prepared for sudden changes; stay flexible.
home.retroNeptune: Misleading situations may occur; trust your intuition but seek clarity.
home.retroPluto: Deep transformations continue; let go of what you cannot control.

energyLabel.default: Planets support you today — make your moves

relationTone.default: in the flow of the day

dailyVibeFallback.0: Move without rush today; the right moment will find you.
dailyVibeFallback.1: A small decision can completely change the rhythm of your day.
dailyVibeFallback.2: Capture a quiet moment; answers will become clear there.
dailyVibeFallback.3: Choose the option that lightens your heart; the day will open with it.

lucky: You can say that word you've been holding in your heart today.
Make an unexpected gesture to strengthen the bond.
mixed: Manage emotional conversations carefully; be patient.
Trust your intuition but don't rush decisions.
caution: Consider postponing sensitive relationship topics today.

lucky: Right moment to take that financial step you've been putting off.
mixed: Evaluate opportunities but don't take big risks.
caution: Postpone major spending and investment decisions for a few days.

lucky: Speak up on a topic where you can show leadership.
Start the project that will make a difference today.
mixed: Strengthen existing projects; start planning new ones.
caution: Postpone negotiations and deals; focus on groundwork.
Take the right step, not the fast one.

lucky: Talk today to ease an old family tension.
Plan quality time with loved ones.
mixed: Watch your words in home conversations.
caution: Consider postponing sensitive home topics today.
Adopt a patient and understanding attitude.

lucky: Great day to build a genuine connection.
Reach out to someone you haven't seen in a while.
mixed: Keep social plans flexible; they may change.
Focus on depth, not surface connections.
caution: Avoid social conflicts; be a listener today.

lucky: Right moment for a partnership offer.
Strong position at the negotiation table.
Good moment to take that step you've been postponing.
Open space for new connections and opportunities.
mixed: Don't rush decisions; step back and evaluate.
caution: Stay observant today; save your move for tomorrow.
Stabilize the current situation; don't expand.

ask: Today the tone of one word may start a deeper connection than you think.
A short message may open the emotional clarity you've long been waiting for.
para: A small spending decision may turn into a great relief this week.
An idea you'll hear during the day may simply strengthen your income.
kariyer: A small step taken today may open the door to the next level.
A feedback in the middle of the day may be a sign to clarify your direction.
aile: A short conversation at home may soften a topic that has been building.
A tiny show of care today may strengthen family bonds faster than expected.
arkadaslik: A genuine connection you build today may be the strongest support of the week.
A short meeting plan may revive the sense of belonging you've been missing.
ticaret: A meeting during the day may turn into a more productive partnership than you think.
Staying calm in a small negotiation may bring a better result than expected.
genel: A sign you don't notice today will repeat for you; don't miss the second one.
A short pause during the day will bring the clarity you've long been waiting for.

numerology.title: Numerology
numerology.subtitle: Discover your path through the energy of numbers
numerology.missingData: Name and birth date required for numerology. Update your profile.
numerology.loadError: Numerology data could not be loaded. Please try again.
numerology.heroFootnote: This reading is a psychology-first guide. It is designed as a reflection layer, not a deterministic verdict.

numerology.timingTitle: Which part of the year are you in?
numerology.cycleProgress: Which part of the year are you in?
numerology.personalYearExplain: It shows your main lesson this year and where your energy is best used.
numerology.universalYearExplain: It is the collective tone everyone shares this year. Read it together with your personal year.
numerology.cycleProgressExplain: It shows how much of the year has passed, so you can follow opening, deepening, and integration phases.

numerology.profileTitle: What do they ask from you together?
numerology.howCalculatedLead: Core numbers are derived from birth date and name. Turkish characters are normalized to Latin equivalents, and 11, 22, and 33 remain unreduced.
numerology.advancedDescription: If you want, you can open cycle and karmic details in one focused panel.

categoryDescriptions.transit: Daily transit impact and overall energy flow.
categoryDescriptions.moon: Moon phase/sign based emotional and timing guidance.

categoryDescriptions.family: Home rhythm, cleaning, repair, and living-space planning decisions.
categoryDescriptions.jointFinance: Timing for budgeting, spending, payment planning, and finance decisions.
categoryDescriptions.beauty: Timing for grooming, aesthetics, epilation, and care routines.
categoryDescriptions.health: Guidance for diet, checks, treatment timing, and body rhythm.
categoryDescriptions.activity: Home, shopping, technology, and social activity decisions.
categoryDescriptions.official: Paperwork, official processes, applications, and contracts.
categoryDescriptions.color: Supportive and caution color palette for the day.
categoryDescriptions.recommendations: Daily action summary and focus recommendations.
categoryDescriptions.investment: Timing for financial moves, investments, and cash flow.
categoryDescriptions.spiritual: Meditation, prayer/worship, and inner spiritual practices.
categoryDescriptions.strategicBusiness: High-impact business decisions and leadership moves.
categoryDescriptions.barberShaving: Shaving, grooming, and personal appearance routines.
categoryDescriptions.carMaintenance: Vehicle maintenance, service, and technical tasks.
categoryDescriptions.skinCare: Skin, beauty treatments, and care routines.
categoryDescriptions.epilationHair: Epilation, hair sessions, and maintenance cycles.
categoryDescriptions.socialHarmony: Relationship balance, social flow, and communication tone.
categoryDescriptions.healthCycle: Body rhythm, checks, and wellness cadence.

panels.cosmicMapSubtitle: Circular chart preview · detailed readings below
panels.birthChartSubtitle: Placidus house lines and circular chart view
panels.aspectMatrixSubtitle: Triangular aspect matrix • effective interactions within orb
panels.cosmicPosSubtitle: Planet, sign, degree/minute and house position technical list
panels.cosmicBalanceSubtitle: Astrological analysis of elemental and modal energy distribution in your chart
panels.elementIntroFire: Fire is the dominant element in your chart. This signals strong willpower, quick decision-making capacity, and an action-oriented energy structure.
panels.elementIntroEarth: Earth is the dominant element in your chart. This means a results-driven mindset, practical intelligence, and a tendency to build secure foundations.
panels.elementIntroAir: Air is the dominant element in your chart. This shows strong analytical thinking, communication skill, and a tendency to create meaning through knowledge.
panels.elementIntroWater: Water is the dominant element in your chart. This signals deep intuitive perception, emotional intelligence, and empathic understanding capacity.
panels.modalityDepthCardinal: With high Cardinal emphasis, you have a natural tendency to initiate new processes and take initiative. Giving projects a structured rhythm may be your growth area for sustainability.
panels.modalityDepthFixed: With strong Fixed emphasis, determination, loyalty, and sustained focus are your natural advantages. Developing flexible responses to changing conditions will increase your potential.
panels.modalityDepthMutable: With dominant Mutable emphasis, you are strong in adapting, embracing different perspectives, and versatile thinking. Clarifying your focus and working on prioritization gives you an edge.
panels.balanceAdviceFire: Low Fire energy shows that you need to consciously nurture motivation and courage. Taking small but decisive steps strengthens the balance in this area.
panels.balanceAdviceEarth: Low Earth energy shows that you need to consciously value concrete planning and material order. Daily routines and financial structuring support the balance in this area.
panels.balanceAdviceAir: Low Air energy shows that you need to make conscious effort in expressing your thoughts verbally and achieving mental clarity. Writing or sharing your thoughts strengthens the balance in this area.
panels.balanceAdviceWater: Low Water energy shows that you need to consciously create space for emotional awareness and intuitive listening. The practice of observing body and emotions supports the balance in this area.
panels.elementSecondaryBalance: The close weight of the {{element}} element also shows that these two energies form a mutually nourishing balance.

help.title: Help
help.feedbackComingSoon: Feedback form will be available soon.
help.appStoreComingSoon: App Store link will be available soon.
help.faq1q: Why was my natal chart calculated incorrectly?
help.faq1a: Chart calculation depends on your birth date, time, and location. You can update your birth information from Profile → Birth Information.
help.faq2q: Why didn't my dream interpretation complete?
help.faq2a: AI interpretations may take a few minutes. You can check the status by opening the relevant entry from the Dreams tab. If the issue persists, restart the app.
help.faq3q: Why didn't my voice recording upload?
help.faq3a: Check if microphone permission is granted. Recording should not exceed 30 seconds. Check your internet connection.
help.faq4a: iOS: Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions → Astro Guru. Android: Play Store → Account → Subscriptions → Astro Guru.
help.faq5q: How can I delete my data?
help.faq5a: Send an email to support@astroguru.app with the subject "Account Deletion Request" for account and all data deletion.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.yourDataInControl: Your data is under your control
privacy.section1Body: Astro Guru collects birth date, time and location, dream entries, and app usage statistics. This data is used only to provide personalized astrology and dream interpretations.
privacy.section2Body: All your data is transmitted over encrypted connections (TLS) and stored on secure servers. Passwords are never stored in plain text; they are hashed with bcrypt.
privacy.section3Body: Your data is not sold to third parties. Only anonymous content is sent to the model used for generating AI interpretations.
privacy.section4Body: You can delete your account and all data at any time. Contact support@astroguru.app for data access and deletion requests.
privacy.section5Body: The mobile app uses only anonymous session data for analytics. No advertising tracking cookies are used.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.section1Body: Astro Guru provides astrology, numerology, dream, and spiritual guidance content for informational and entertainment purposes. It does not replace medical, legal, financial, or professional advice.
terms.section2Body: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for the activity performed through your account. Please use accurate information during registration and keep your profile up to date.
terms.section3Body: If premium plans, subscriptions, or consumable purchases are offered, pricing is shown before confirmation and billing is handled by Apple App Store or Google Play according to their store terms.
terms.section4Body: Do not misuse the app, attempt unauthorized access, interfere with other users, or upload unlawful, harmful, or abusive content. Accounts may be limited or suspended to protect the service and community.
terms.section5Body: These terms may be updated as the product evolves. Continued use after an update means you accept the revised terms. Contact us for questions about the service or your account.

planetSheet.personalizedFallback: Your {{planet}} is in {{sign}} and House {{house}}. This triple combination ({{combo}}) shapes your behavior especially in {{houseDesc}}.
planetSheet.strengthsFallback: When used well, this placement opens a powerful inner resource and channel of expression.
planetSheet.houseBoxText: House {{house}}: {{desc}}. This planet's energy shows up most in this life area for you.
planetSheet.lineCharacter: The {{combo}} combination creates an expressive style in you that works through {{shortDesc}}. {{snippet}}
planetSheet.lineEffect: {{meaning}} As this energy flows into the {{houseDesc}} area, you may tend to make decisions more in a {{sign}} style.
planetSheet.lineEffectFallback: {{planet}} governs a specific theme in your life.
planetSheet.lineCautionRetro: Because {{planet}} is retrograde, you may tend to process things internally before acting. Taking a second look rather than rushing serves you well.
planetSheet.lineCautionNormal: When you push {{planet}} energy too hard, you can get stuck in a single perspective. Flexibility and feedback restore balance.
planetSheet.glossarySnippet: This placement especially highlights the theme of {{desc}}.

bigThreeSheet.sunHook: The essence of your soul shines here. The Sun shows the core energy you identify with as 'this is who I am.'
bigThreeSheet.moonHook: Your emotional security needs, inner voice, and instinctive reflexes are shaped by your Moon placement.
bigThreeSheet.risingHook: How people first perceive you and the mask you wear entering new situations is read through your Rising sign.
bigThreeSheet.signFallback: {{name}} energy gives a strong tone to this area.
bigThreeSheet.cardImpactSun: {{sign}} Sun prioritizes self-expression and preserving your identity at decision moments.
bigThreeSheet.cardImpactMoon: {{sign}} Moon checks your inner comfort and emotional security before any decision.
bigThreeSheet.cardImpactRising: {{sign}} Rising helps you quickly choose a direction in new environments.
bigThreeSheet.cardDailyMoon: In close relationships, you tend to express emotions through the {{element}} element.
bigThreeSheet.cardDailyRising: Your {{modality}} mode sets the behavioral rhythm for first impressions; your approach is read through it.
bigThreeSheet.cardCautionSun: The Sun in this sign can sometimes heighten self-proving pressure; resting and connecting with your inner voice restores balance.
bigThreeSheet.cardCautionMoon: When emotionally overwhelmed in your Moon placement, speaking your needs openly — rather than retreating — brings relief.
bigThreeSheet.cardCautionRising: Your Rising can trigger an automatic defense mode; taking a second breath before reacting first softens relationships.

starMate.bioPlaceholder: A short but characterful paragraph about yourself...
starMate.discoveryDisabledBody: Your profile is instantly hidden from the deck. You can re-enable it from the Settings tab.
starMate.deckEmptyBody: Expand your filters or lower the minimum compatibility threshold. A new synastry queue can be prepared in the background.
starMate.deckHintText: Swipe the card left/right or flick up to use Super Star. The info (i) button opens the mini synastry report.
starMate.settingsEnableDesc: When off, your profile is instantly hidden from the card deck. Existing matches and conversations remain visible.
starMate.settingsStrictToggle: Only show people in this range
starMate.settingsSynastryQueueBody1: On app launch and filter changes, synastry calculations for candidates matching geo + age criteria are queued in the background. The UI only shows pre-calculated candidates.
starMate.settingsSynastryQueueBody2: Toggling Discovery off immediately stops feed queries and card rendering on the client side. The server must record discoveryEnabled=false.
starMate.profilePhotosDesc: Tap a slot to add/change a photo. Tap a filled slot then another to swap (drag-drop fallback).
starMate.profileBioDesc: No sharing social media usernames or contact info.
starMate.profileCosmicAutoTagsDesc: Auto-suggested based on your natal chart. You can toggle them on/off.
starMate.profilePreviewDesc: The cosmic badge + tag view that other users will see on your card.
starMate.noLikesBody: Stay active in the Discover deck to see people who like you here.
starMate.noChatBody: When you match, a chat opens with an AI icebreaker.
starMate.previewSummary: {{score}}% match. This card simulates the cosmic badge your profile shows to others.
starMate.previewWhyScore: Your Sun-Moon rhythm and relationship intent signals appear well-aligned.
starMate.previewSparkNote: Your profile voice is warm and clear, which boosts conversion in high-compatibility matches.
starMate.previewCautionNote: Adding one more authentic detail to your bio reduces false-positive matches.
starMate.previewAiInsight: Strong card. A hobby + a relationship intention + a line of humor makes a difference in conversion.
starMate.previewAspect1Note: A clear and sincere tone comes through.
starMate.previewAspect2Note: High filter alignment with people seeking long-term connections.
starMate.previewAspect3Note: Adding one distinguishing detail would improve quality.
